title: 皐月賞の後に・忍び寄る鬼

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: The showdown between BNW was so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket ended up in first, but Narita
Taishin did amazing too.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Right? That was some awesome sprinting! Was she
always so fast?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I did it, I did it, I did it! I beat them!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: (She ran so well... I thought I was gonna lose!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: (What if... I lose to her at the Derby?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uwaaaaa! I can't be a coward now! No, no, nope!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Either way... I can't afford to lose the next race.
I'll take every necessary precaution.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll have do a proper analysis of today's match. Of
Ticket's performance... and yours as well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh. If it makes you feel better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of BNW's intense race at the Satsuki Sho
spread like wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, more fans than ever were clamoring
to get seats for their next showdown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time. Next up is the Japanese Derby, Winning
Ticket's dream race!
